summary: This document is a slide deck outlining the user workflow of the KeepmeCompany AI platform. It details steps for creating calls, selecting patients, and accessing call summaries or transcripts via a dashboard. The slides highlight the product's functionality as a Class I Medical Device with Cyber Essentials certification.
